HtmlContent:
REPORT CARD

Academic Year: 2024-2025 / End of Year

Name: Aadira Akhtar

Class: 5C

Tutor Name: Mrs P. Jain

TEACHER COMMENT

SUBJECT AGE RELATED EXPECTATION ATL

Aadira is a bright and bubbly girl with a great future ahead of her. She is a kind and polite member of the class that always

wants to do her best. During year 5 I have noticed how she seeks feedback and uses this to improve her performance. She

General

always strives to be the best and works extremely hard to complete all tasks to a high standard. Her calm and respectful

nature makes her popular amongst staff and students alike. Her analytical mind helps her problem solve and she enjoys

Comment

working with other classmates to find solutions. Alongside her academic interest she shows lots of passion for other parts of

the curriculum. I wish Aadira all the best in the future as she continues her journey at CIA.

Aadira's writing is descriptive, imaginative and cohesive. Characters are developed with originality and well described actions

Reading Writing

and correctly punctuated dialogue. Varied sentence structure and complex vocabulary are used to ensure an enjoyable read.

Aadira reads a wide range of texts fluently and accurately using of pauses, emphasis and pace. Aadira understands how a

English 1

Curriculum Year 5 Curriculum Year 5

sentence's meaning is shaped by punctuation, word order, conjunctions and openers. Aadira makes inferences; linking

Mastered Mastered

supportive quotes and phrases within the text. She can name a wide range of organisational features; explaining their

purpose. Aadira can analyse how authors express different moods, feelings and attitudes.

Aadira follows directions promptly and accurately. She has made excellent progress in maths this year according to age-

related expectations. Critical thinking, problem-solving and reasoning are strengths of Aadira. She can link these aspects to

all units of mathematics including place value knowledge to 10,000,000, written and mental methods for all four operations,

Mathematics Curriculum Year 5 Secure+ 1

fractions and decimals and measure. When working on these units, Aadira refers to her prior knowledge and will always try

the task at hand before asking for support and guidance.

Using strategic thinking, Aadira can plan, conduct and perform fair experiments and can explain findings in a written report

using scientific language. Furthermore, Aadira can use their knowledge of solids, liquids and gases to decide how mixtures

might be separated, including through filtering, sieving and evaporating. Showing her meta-thinking talents, she can explain

Science Curriculum Year 5 Mastered 1

the effects of gravity, air resistance and friction on objects, and can give reasons for predictions made using patterns in data.

Moreover, Aadira can explain the movement of the earth around the sun and on its axis as well as seasonal changes here on

Earth.

SUBJECT PERCENTAGE ATTITUDE TO LEARNING

Arabic 84% 1

Islamic 84% 1

Moral Social and Cultural Studies 92% 1

Student Promoted from Current Year Group to New
